title: gentiana albicalyx subsp. globosa
intro: Gentiana albicalyx subsp. globosa is a subalpine plant species belonging to the gentian family (Gentianaceae), characterized by its distinctive, rounded shape and white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Gentiana albicalyx subsp. globosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Gentiana albicalyx subsp. globosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
